metadata.description: DatabaseConnectionPool concept with a code reference pointing to the SQLite store implementation. Tests that code_references field is handled correctly. All Level 1 checks pass.

concepts.name: SQLiteKnowledgeStore
concepts.description: Manages a SQLite database connection for the knowledge graph, providing thread-safe access via a per-call connection factory. Implements the KnowledgeStore protocol and handles all DDL via versioned migrations applied at construction time. Writes to concepts, edges, and work_items tables using parameterised SQL to prevent injection, and exposes dual-write coordination hooks used by DualWriter.
